name: Dark Clarice
title: Maid of Darkness
description: However, her demeanor could hardly be called submissive. She would even defy the young queen. "You thought you could tame me? How utterly presumptuous." Stung by her words and thrown off by her whims, the courtiers soon formed a secret fan club.

localization.name: Lethal Plague
localization.description:
Grants 1 enemy the Lethal Poison status effect, and Infects them with it.

After the end of each turn, this infection will trigger to apply Lethal Poison to a random non-burning, non-Lethal Poisoned unit on the infected unit's team. Infection ends after 3 triggers (even if they find no valid target) or once the infected enemy is defeated or leaves the battlefield. Infection is not a status effect and cannot be prevented or purified, but the status effect spread by the infection may be. A unit cannot get a new infection until their existing one ends.

This skill is locked for 100TU after use. Usable 5 times per battle.

Lethal Poison will overwrite other status effects, lasts 999 TU, cannot be overwritten by status effects other than Burn or Stealth, and cannot be Purified. Lethal Poison deals 2 times the damage of normal Poison, and ignores passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, other than those which specifically prevent defeat from Poison or non-attack damage. Lethal Poison cannot apply to Burning or Boss units.
localization.selected:
Grants & Infects 1 enemy with Lethal Poison
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Throw Knives
localization.description:
500% damage to 1 random enemy. Minus 100% damage for each non-poisoned enemy on the battlefield (max of -400% if there are 4 non-poisoned enemies). This attack cannot be redirected by Guardians, and ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then the target hit has its Poison Wards removed, burn removed (including Mega Healing Burn) and is randomly granted either Super Poison, Mega Poison for 200TU, or Lethal Poison for 999TU. This will overwrite other status effects on that enemy. If this skill is used 3 times within 10TU, it becomes locked for 50TU.

Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison. Mega Poison deals 20 times the damage of normal Poison and cannot be overwritten by normal Poison or Super Poison.
localization.selected:
100%+ damage, apply poison
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Massacre
localization.description: 100% damage to all enemies, plus 100% for each time this skill has already been used while on the battlefield (max of 400% total damage). This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

localization.name: Death's Kiss
localization.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 50% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable if all enemies on the battlefield are poisoned. Usable 3 times per battle.

localization.name: Toxic Maid
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an attack while there is a Poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit will survive with 1HP remaining instead. Then this unit will remove poison (including Lethal Poison) from a random poisoned enemy at the end of turn.

This unit heals for 50% of max HP whenever it damages a poisoned enemy with an attack (triggers once per poisoned enemy hit).

This unit's Attack is increased by:
- 1.25x if there is exactly 1 Poisoned enemy on the battlefield.
- 1.5x if there are exactly 2 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
- 1.75x if there are exactly 3 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
- 2.0x if there are exactly 4 Poisoned enemies on the battlefield.
These Attack increases do not stack with Enrage effects.

localization.name: Relentless Killer
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Poison or Burn status effects.

Each time a unit gets the turn, this unit will be healed for 10% of its max HP.

If no enemy is Poisoned at the start of an enemy turn, then at the end of that turn this unit will be Purified (any negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and will have its TU reduced to 0. Then this effect cannot trigger again until 100TU advances (minus 20TU per Awakening).

After entering battle, for 200TU, this unit:
- Cannot be burned
- Reduces the amount of any stun effects against this unit by 100TU.
- Will ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets (attacks that target all allies will not be ignored).

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: G.axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Greataxes.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
